key_models.website: Website configuration. Fields: name, domain, company_id, theme_id, configurator_done.
key_models.website.page: Published page record. Fields: name, url, view_id, website_id, is_published, date_publish.
key_models.website.menu: Website navigation menu. Fields: name, url, page_id, parent_id, website_id, sequence.
key_models.ir.ui.view: QWeb view and page layout. Fields: key, type, website_id, arch_db, inherit_id.
key_models.product.template: Product template. Fields: website_published, is_published, public_categ_ids, website_description_sale.
key_models.product.product: Product variant with extra price and combination. Fields: product_tmpl_id, product_template_attribute_value_ids.
key_models.sale.order: E-commerce cart/order. Fields: website_id, partner_id, order_line, amount_total, state.
key_models.payment.provider: Payment provider configuration. Fields: name, code, state, company_id, website_id.
key_models.blog.post: Blog post. Fields: name, blog_id, content, is_published, post_date, author_id.
key_models.website.visitor: Anonymous/known visitor tracking. Fields: access_token, partner_id, visit_count.

crons.website_visitor_cron: Clean and archive old website visitor data. Model: website.visitor
crons.website_sale_cart_recovery: Send abandoned cart emails. Model: sale.order

security_groups.website.group_website_designer: Full website builder access including HTML and theme editing
security_groups.website.group_website_restricted_editor: Edit page content and snippets but not theme code
security_groups.base.group_portal: Portal users with access to their account pages
security_groups.sales_team.group_sale_salesman: Access sales orders created through e-commerce

record_rules.product_template_public_rule: Published products are visible to public/portal users
